review_text:
Brakewall Holiday Park is a really lovely spot – everything was clean, well-kept, and there are even some nice cafés just around the corner. Over Easter, it was a bit over my budget, but that doesn’t stop me from giving 5 stars – and the reason is Dawn!

Dawn at reception was amazing – so friendly and helpful. She suggested I walk around the park and check out the spot, even offering a discount because it wasn’t the best site – such a thoughtful touch! When it was still a bit too pricey for me, she recommended a free parking spot nearby where I could stay overnight without any hassle.

On top of that, I told her about a problem with my car, and she immediately found a mechanic for me, gave me the phone number, all written down. The next day, I came back and was even allowed to charge my power station – everything went perfectly!

If you’re looking for a beautiful holiday park with staff that genuinely care and go the extra mile, this is the place. Dawn is an absolute legend – seriously top-notch!
Clean Well manicured sites, great close to sea great views and walks.
Excellent location. Immaculate accommodation. Very efficient staff. We will be back. Thanks for a relaxing few days.

Rigtig godt campsite, med utrolig god placering, dog i den dyre ende for powered sites. Helt nye og rene køkkenfaciliteter og fine bade og toiletter. Man kan vaske der dog er er det ret dyrt og på vaskemaskinen, kunne vi kun få lov at vælge de kolde programmer og ikke de varme tiltrods for at man betalte.
Venligt og hjælpsomt personale.
Vi kommer gerne igen!

The park its self is in a great location but the staff in the office were dreadful I had a fall on the premises and broke my arm. When reporting it the woman at the desk couldn't have cared less and was so rude, didn't even ask if I was ok. I will say the assistant manager was much nicer. The next day again went to the office to ask for assistance with the wi fi and an again the woman was rude. Their customer service needs a review and  don't expect any nicesties from them .
Friendly team at reception, enjoyed our upgrade thanks ladies. Peaceful sleep by the water.
Beautiful artwork on breakwall close to everything

So disappointed. With the promise of family friendly fun, my six-year-old was excited to do anything kid related.

On the Saturday we were told that they were not bringing out any of the kids activities due to the weather- Which was understandable even though they were only light showers.

Then on the Sunday when I asked them again about kids activities on the ‘field of dreams’ they said that they “don’t bring out the kids activities on the weekend.”

My parents have stayed there numerous times over the past 10 years. They have been there on the weekend when kids activities have been available. The website advertised family friendly fun and activities. The only thing my son did was going in the pool. There was nothing else for him to do internally. All the activities we had to do were external.

Will NOT be coming back.

Would never have any NRMA products, terrible customer service from top to bottom.
Just cancelled an Insurance policy due to their rude and incompetent behaviours.
Central to town, water frontage good van sites and amenities clean, easy stroll along breakwall to shopping restaurants, staff pleasant reasonable rates for location.
Stayed in one of the cabins on the breakwall great location room was comfortable enough but had cockroaches come in during the night.11/05/2026

Top location right near Main Street.
Clean facilities, friendly grounds staff , well
Maintained sites

Great location, nice park. Short walk to town centre, info centre and coffee shops.  For those staying here, make sure you know where the bins are before dark or you could be walking further than required.  Also notice some parks locate their double toilet roll holders on the wall, same side as the door hinge.  This means it has to be far enough back so the door doesn't hit it. Just need to be a gymnast to get your toilet paper.  Maybe it's an OHS or ergonomic thing!

Really top park. We had an en-suite site for our motorhome.
Located right next to the breakwater. Great views.
Close to amenities for breakfast lunch and dinner. The Little Shack and Beach House Hotel are both great spots.

The main shopping Centre is a short scroll away.

We will certainly be back!
Great location, clean and tidy park with something for all ages to do, even your pets.
Excellent location. Friendly staff. Beautiful grounds and pool.
Stayed here in our caravan and couldn’t fault it, location is amazing and the parks facilities are clean and tidy. Would recommend
Fantastic park in the best location.
We stayed on a site so N/A for rooms. Amenities were spotless. Easy to navigate through the park, sites are large. Staff are very friendly.

Perfect location!
Good campsites, definitely enough space

Lovely short stay in Port Macquarie - Park amenities were clean, location  great & within walking distance to great food shacks & city centre.
Location was also great for short drives to visit surrounding areas - Bonney Hills & Big brother lookout Doorogan 😍
Great location. Friendly staff
Fantastic location. Walk to town along sea break wall. Big park, generous sites. Clean amenities. Friendly Reception Staff and an NRMA discount.
Great location, reasonably priced. Clean tidy cabins with a fantastic view. Centrally located. We loved our stay and will be back again.
Always a pleasure
Caravan campsites were clean and plenty of room for a 27 foot Van

The confirmation and payment request, which arrived in the early morning when you are on your way with a little caravan, is too late.  It needs to arrive earlier so that you have time to read it to find out what is expected on your first visit especially after driving 6 hours.  I got to the gate and had no idea of what to do and then received a lecture from the receptionist.  The parking allotments and actually road paths are much too small for cars to park their respective caravans.  There were no waste baskets near the cooking facilities and benches.  Sadly, I won't go back.

Had a site,always good to stay
Very handy spot
Convenient location,lovely parp
We loved our visit to Port Macquarie. Such a pretty place with beautiful beaches, some great wineries close by and fabulous restaurants.

This was supposed to be a deluxe cabin and we paid huge fees (more expensive than anywhere we have been over the last few years)
Pros:  Large cabin with big rooms and deck
Cons:  Kitchen did NOT have oven or dishwasher or towel rails for t towels
Bedrooms had small free-standing wardrobe with hanging space only and the one in second bedroom had an ironing board in it which allowed no space for anything
Bathroom water went everywhere outside of shower stall and you had to be a contortionist to use the toilet paper

As this was the most expensive cabin we have ever stayed in and it was advertised as being a DELUXE cabin we were extremely disappointed and would never recommend this park to  anyone.
Great place perfect location. Walking distance to Cafes, restaurants, beach and Supermarkets.
Amazing. We will be back.
Great place,  love the location

We are local Port Macquarie residents, we've been traveling our great country for the past 2years fulltime.
We planned to come back home to catch up with friends and doctor appointments etc. This is the first time that we've stayed at the Breakwall Caravan Park and it's a beauty. It's location was superb for us within walking distance for all our needs. The staff are happy & smiling people and are there to please you the best they can.
The Park is well maintained with staff continually mowing sites cleaning amenities and fixing and issues around the park.
I would highly recommend this Park for anyone travelling or looking for that short weekend away.
Stayed at Caravan site. Access is bit hard but good caravan site
Lovely walk along here especially early morning 🌄
Beautiful 😍
An amazing team and will definitely recommend
Lovely park to stay at for all types families. Very clean

Would be a five star except for four days of constant chain smoking coming from the neighbours, cabins and powered sites alike. Could really do with a smoke free zone to ensure a safe holiday with the kids.

El camping es muy lindo, está súper cuidado, las instalaciones están limpias al igual que los baños y las BBQ. Está súper cerca del centro y a unos minutos de la playa.
Las personas de recepción son súper amables, vale la pena quedarse
Absolutely perfect location being right near the beach and many restaurants within walking distance.Amenities were immaculate

Spent a Great Week in our Van at the Breakwall Holiday Park, Port Macquarie.  4th time visit.
Great location - Highly recommend.

Stayed for a couple of weeks,  was very busy over the Easter period,  but that's to be expected.
Close to the beach and great sun rises,  as well as sunsets over the river.
Great location, easy walk to town and shopping centre.
Lots of restaurants and cafes to choose from.
Great parks and walk ways.
Definitely a place we will visit again.
Excellent location! Beautiful park. Great staff & so much to do in Port Macquarie. Walking distance to all you need. Excellent restaurants nearby too.
Staff amazing. Loved our stay

We had such a lovely family holiday over Easter at NRMA Port Macquarie Breakwall. The facilities and cabins were in excellent condition and had everything we needed to ensure we had an enjoyable stay. Love the proximity to the beach and main part of town - we'll absolutely be back!
Perfect spot for families. Right on the water, right next to a skate park and playgrounds. Restaurants/beach and cafes all in walking distance means you can park and stay parked all stay!
Great site in a great location. |Easy walk to the main centre with loads of food options. |Facilities were great and spacing between pitches was good too! |Would stay again!
Great location and good facilities. Very easy to book, check in and reception staff are lovely.
Fantastic location, ease with express check-in. Clean amenities
great spot to spend 4 or 5 nights or just a one night stopover to break up the trip

Highly recommend this holiday park. It’s good for the kids as it’s quite big for them to play.  Being so close to the water is awesome for fishing or wildlife watching and the path along the waterfront is awesome to get into town with a short 5 minute walk.   Definitely come again.
Great caravan park, all the staff members are very friendly.
Everything was great couldnt give a bad comment even if I wanted to
Clean and comfy
Very clean quiet park in a great location
Great camping grounds, location and ammenities clean. Highly recommend staying, camping or Van life is second to none.

Super Campingplatz mit riesigem Poolund kleinem Spieplatz. Neben dem Campingplatz war auch noch ein großer Spielplatz. Toiletten und Duschen waren sauber. Internet Wlan war OK, Handyempfang war super.

Great location central to everything. A flat easy walk to all of life’s greatest pleasures- beautiful beaches / food / ice cream / scenic walks! The pool is huge and a nice amount of space to laze or perch for a bit. These parks also seem to attract friendly people who are always up for a chat! We loved our stay and can’t wait to return! Unfortunately we had so much fun we forgot to take photos!
We hope we will return for another stay soon! Great staff helped us to organise a small reunion, modern amenities,  good sites and close to shopping and food outlets made it memorable!

We travel in a campervan with our dog so the location is perfect for us. Pet friendly park. This was our second visit and will likely return again.
Easy, beautiful walk to Town Beach and also into town centre for pubs and restaurants. Amenities are always kept very clean. Love this park

Very busy....
Camped near breakwall.... very noisy early morning with all the morning runners an dog walkes....
Would recomend the back lots.
Lack of bins locations...
Ony two bin locatations found... either end of the park...
For a dog freindly park .. freinds received phone calls and text messages to keep dogs quiet...
We were nearby and didnt haer them... thet are good dog...
Off lease area size of a caravan site..
Locked at night open after 9:00am
No poop bags or bins for poop...

The cabin was a bit older, but very clean. Excellent location and close to town. Great having the breakwall walking track right on the water. Pool was a great temperature and kids loved swimming in the pool

Wir haben zwei Nächte auf diesem Campingplatz verbracht und sind komplett zufrieden! Gute, saubere Toiletten und große Stellplätze. Einziger Mangel: es liegen viele Blätter und Äste auf den Stellplätzen und überall dazwischen rum.
Wir hatten zuerst einen Stellplatz ohne Strom gebucht für etwa 100$ für drei Personen. Wir entschieden uns aber für die zweite Nacht zu einem Stellplatz mit Strom zu wechseln, was durch das sehr nette Personal super funktioniert hat. Super gelegen! Ein toller Campingplatz!

NRMA Breakwall Port Macquarie is downright fantastic. Me and my family (wife and toddler) had the best time staying in one of the awesome cabins along the water! Right from checking into the resort we were met with lovely staff. The cabins were clean and fresh! With parks for kids at both ends of the resort and plenty of great food, pubs and coffee within walking distance its a no brainer to come back again! All the guests were great and very nice, kids loved playing together through and park. Laundry facilities were great and modern and very handy during a longer stay, we used them frequently! Safe to say we will definitely be back!! We will miss the morning walks along the breakwall to get coffee, the evening walks to get dinner and drinks, the drinks on the deck watching vans arriving and leaving and reading books on the balcony on those rainy days!! Thoroughly enjoyed having our own bbq on our deck giving us the opportunity to have a bbq dinner or lunch on the days we didnt feel like heading out to just relax and enjoy the atmosphere of the breakwall whilst having our meals!! Thankyou NRMA Breakwall for a fabulous holiday!
Loved this place, location is perfect we will be back to stay longer

Excellent position and facilities.
Sites are large but we were allocated a very noisy position opposite maintenance shed.
Rules are stipulated but not enforced. Dogs off lead on numerous occasions and kids running rampant on e-bikes/scooters. Management not interested in these issues.
Noise from parties well into the night.
Only picked here as well positioned to town and beaches.
Very large and busy park.

The campsite is beautiful, very large, with incredible views.
Check-in and check-out were very easy; we didn’t even have to go to reception.
The toilets and kitchen were very clean.
My only suggestion is that there should be toilets and a kitchen near the unpowered sites.
I recommend it.
Excellent value for money

Great location with close amenities. Managed to do loads of activities in the 4 days there. Bike riding on the breakwall and around town, swimming in the pool, fishing, sightseeing and eating out with friends.
Best stop of the trip. Looking forward to visiting the park again next trip.
Very friendly managers. Clean and tidy facilities. Pool great and refreshing.  Great location.

We absolutely loved staying here! The location is fantastic, right next to a lovely riverside walkway with such a great atmosphere. It’s also very close to the beach, and there are activities for all ages which made it perfect for our group. The accommodation had everything we needed and was very comfortable. We had a wonderful time and would highly recommend this place!

We attended a family get together at Port Macquarie (Westport Bowling Club) and needed accommodation close by. We found the Breakwall Holiday Park ideal for location and were pleasantly surprised at the facilities. The cabin was clean and all that we needed for our 3 day stay. The fact that the Park was in walking distance of good eating places in the town proved that our choice was excellent. We would certainly recommend this venue to our friends.
Fantastic experience! Very well maintained, plenty of bbqs, toilets, showers, has a pool. Great location by the water and next to the centre. Super friendly staff! We really enjoyed our stay :)

Camping veramente fantastico, bagni molto puliti e servizi( reception,laundry ecc) posizione direttamente sul mare. Unico neo: siamo arrivati alle 10 di sera e al mattino abbiamo cercato di riparare un guasto grave alla carrozzeria del camper, abbiamo chiesto due ore di sosta in più e ce le hanno negate! C’erano molti posti liberi nel campeggio e la scusa che avevano molti arrivi ci ha convinto poco! Comunque in fretta e furia abbiamo ultimato parzialmente i lavori e alle 10.46 siamo usciti… a parte questo inconveniente, per noi, il camping merita davvero!

This is by far the best campsite I have stayed at. The location couldn't be any better. You are at one of the best spots in the city. It's peaceful, clean, and green!
The staff are very helpful. Couldn't recommend this more emphatically :)

We use our own caravan which is quite large and their are a number of sites usually available that fits it comfortably. This park is clean, neat & tidy. The amenities are very modern. The staff helpful & friendly. The park is situated well for a short walk to the centre of Port Macquarie and to numerous swimming/surf beaches. We have stayed multiple times and will happily return. Dog friendly with a fenced dog run. Kid friendly with pool and activities (during school hols). BBQs and camp kitchen. Tent sites also available.
Great place amazing position great staff .stayed in a caravan so can't speak for the rooms although alot of the fam have stayed in them and they look great
Well it's got a huge space... Nice surrounding overlooking the water great view. Toilets are clean and the showers as well.. it's really nice
Wonderful location, great amenities
Great location and price for a 6berth cabin. Close to facilities, shops, cafes and playgrounds
The caravan park is located in a great location and is close to the beach, cafes and shops.
We stay at Tasman towers apartment at port macquarie for 5 nights 🌙,  good to stay away from Sydney,  great sunny weather 😎 👍 👌 and go to the beach ⛱️ 😎
Great place and people
We have visited this park a number of times in last 4 years and find its location the best to discover a really pleasant part of NSE
Unpowered camp sites, next to the beach, great amenities,  lovely helpful staff. If in town, we will be staying there again
We love the location of NRMA Port Mac, as well as the grounds and camp sites been well looked after and clean. Such a great spot for the family
Stayed at the breakwall cabins, fantastic stay, cabin was right at the breakwall with great views, rooms were clean, spacious and well equipped. The holiday park was bustling with many holidayers
Lovely park beautiful spot so close to everything enjoyed our stay
Great park in a great location with modern facilities and a pool. Close to cafes, restaurants, beaches, walks and cruises.

Nice place but inconsiderate staff.. and we were surrounded by barking dogs and smokers.. They made us wait an hour til twelve o'clock while they supposedly cleaned our site which was vacant. Then after we were let in had to get them to come and clean our site up.. The breakwall was nice but very busy as the locals run and ride their skateboards and scooters and ebikes very hard to enjoy the scenery dodging all the traffic on the breakwall
Great service from reception and very friendly staff. The Park is clean and maintained, close to shops, eateries and the beach.
Wonderful caravan park. Very clean and tidy amenities. Great customer service. Good location. Only a short walk to various restaurants etc.

We had a 4 person riverside cabin (bear in mind the glass entry door can be a bit hard to slide open)|Cannot fault this place.|Arrival was effortless.|Staff were extremely friendly.|Cabin was immaculate.|Large front porch totally undercover. Great place to view the waterway and passing dolphins.|We had a problem with the tv which was fixed very quickly by a very friendly staff member.|Venue is very close to all the town offers and fishing locations.|Park has an eatery open most nights from 4-8pm with great tasteful offerings.|Pool is spacious and surrounds are partially undercover. Also a short walk to the beach and lookouts.|A wonderful stress free time.
Great location and great park to stay at.

We stayed at the NRMA Breakwall Holiday Park in early February this year. The location and amenities were fantastic and I highly recommend it. The only disappointing thing was that there were no picnic tables at the BBQ areas except for the main area with the camp kitchen. It appears that several campers had taken the tables and located them behind their campervans/caravans for their own personal use. The ground caretakers would have noticed that they were missing but did nothing to relocate the picnic tables back to the BBQ areas.

Awesome.  Stayed in a lot of places and this one is my favourite so far. Perfect location right next to the water and a great sized pitch along with spotlessly clean amenities. Plenty of toilets and showers accessible with a door code, which I like.  Shame we only stayed two nights.
There was only one downside, the lack of WiFi. We were obviously in the 'black spot' where it was non existent.
Awesome park
Great location, right next to the coastal walk. Clean room with modern and stylish furniture. Clean bbq areas and nice pool!
Great caravan park..

Location of this park is its attraction.
Sites are well maintained plus roomy.
Ammenities clean .
Quiet after 9pm
Most people are respectful of others.
Relaxing environment.

We stay here February every year & love it. The park is in a great location and is always clean & tidy. I would like to see an area dedicated for those caravanners/campers with pets instead of all through the park though.

Best location, lovely staff and a large area. All crammed in like sardines is the norm these days and this place sticks with tradition. Toilets get well used and could do with more ventilation for the number of showers. Recommend for the price but disappointing the price goes up on weekends.
Always a great place to stay
Fabulous spot, clean and great staff
Clean and comfortable cabins. Excellent location for walks, beach, town

We love this spot !! Beautiful cabins with lovely outlooks to the Breakwall and water views. Verandah with your own bbq and outdoor table for meals. Great setup close to town right on the Breakwall for walking and taking the kids in prams or on their bikes.
Quiet park with good facilities, secure park with boom gate access. A great place to stay !!
NRMA Breakwall is the perfect place to stay in Port Macquarie. An easy walk to everything and it’s clean and well looked after. We had a cabin with a beautiful view over the water
Great place to stay in centre of Port Macquarie. Walking distance to shops, restaurants, Town Beach. Neat and ride caravan sites, spotless facilities.

This was our 2nd stay at the park. Check in was super easy and it’s a very tidy park.
It’s well positioned but the public can easily walk through. There weren’t many toilets in the amenities.
The staff were very friendly and helpful, but the place was too small and there were so many clueless people that you didn't feel comfortable at all staying there.
Great spot and PM is a beautiful town!
Caravaning, nice sites, good amenities clean and a great location .

Cracker location, caravan sites were reasonably priced for school holidays.
It got a pool and is right next the the skate park and beach.

I stayed at the Breakwall and had an incredible experience. My cabin was extremely clean, and the staff were lovely. The park manager Dawn is exceptional and she is amazing at what she does. I will be staying again!!!

Not for us, we pulled in just on dark, the park was overcrowded with little room to manoeuvre our big rig and could hardly read the street signs. People are pretty much on top of each other, not ideal if you prefer privacy. It would be a nice place if you had kids etc and didn't mind the hustle & bustle, but not our idea of a break away.

Told there were no vacancies, yet at least 30+ empty sites were clearly available when we drove through. No explanation given. Photos added for proof. Very disappointing and misleading.If the park doesn’t want walk-ins or has other booking policies, that should be communicated honestly instead of simply saying there’s no space when that clearly isn’t the case. Wasted our time and left a bad impression.

The location is excellent, with a massive park that's essentially a city within a city. The spots are cramped next to each other, so it can get noisy. The spots in the back near the fence are particularly nice and quiet. Only one building with toilets and showers, I was fortunate enough to always get the last toilet and shower.

My wife and myself enjoy the time using the Cabins going for walks close to everything. The staff are very friendly at reception. The rooms are spotless. Clean that’s all you need when you’re on a break and convenient to all the shops easy parking.👌💯.
Ocean breeze, lazy times. Not here for activities here to do nothing in a great spot.

I stayed in a studio and it was good. The bed was a bit too soft for me as I have a problem with my back but I believe it'll be fine for most people.
It's in a very good location. easy to get to the main streets for restaurants and shops on foot. I'll come back for sure.
Great location, amenities were good. Some unpowered sites are small (for tents) so if you have a camper trailer or caravan make sure to note a bit extra length when booking.

Excellent location. Sites are a tad small.
Amenities are great. Try to go in the off season for the best experience.

Travelled down from Brisbane in a camper looking for a campsite in port Macquarie.saw this site but to be honest some reviews weren't great.it was near to town so thought we'd try it .so so pleased we did.everything you would want.showers and toilets super clean.close to a lovely Beach.staff so helpful.would definitely stay here again massive 10/10

One pool for the whole park. Sites for Caravans over 25 feet not big enough. Shade cloth net on base for when you step out of door about 40 years old, holes everywhere in it. To many vans jammed together, not enough room on these sites. Kids riding around on motorised scooters with no helmets. Don't talk after 10.00pm or they tell you to go to bed. Staff in the office are very rude.

Tolle Lage direkt an der Mündung vom Fluss. Nur 100m zum Strand. Sehr freundliche Mitarbeiter. Und habe die angemalten Steine an der Uferpromenade gefallen. Wir alle NRMA guter Standard an Sauberkeit und schön angelegt.
Great Caravan park, right next to a large public playground, skatepark, and beach. The sites were large and provided everything, and the pool is huge (and heated). Good park.
Overall a very nice holiday park. But we were near the very end of the park and wifi was just non existent

We booked a unpowered site. I liked the location, but the Staff was super unfriendly (not even a „hello“), locked all the amenities for several hours for cleaning, on the unpowered site you don’t even have wifi, and they only have one kitchen for the whole entire campingsite.

I was extremely disappointed with my recent stay at this NRMA caravan park and will not be returning. The staff were incredibly rude when I called to ask for the bathroom code — I’m pregnant and urgently needed to use the facilities, yet I was abruptly told, “It’s in the email,” before the staff member hung up on me. I then had to walk all the way back across the park to get my partner’s phone just to find the code, which was completely unnecessary and stressful.
On top of that, we were placed in a caravan site even after clearly explaining that we had a large tent. The site we were given was so small we could barely fit when trying to set up.
Overall, the lack of basic customer service and consideration made for a very unpleasant stay.
Poor service, and attitude from staff! The worst holiday park ever! 1-star if not zero.

Cleanly toilets, text me the check in codes before I arrived which made it easier but also didn’t have to interact with a single staff member our entire stay. Camp site was peaceful but right next to the river, which we enjoyed for ease of access, but was also slightly unsafe. Big argument broke out between a camper and someone else in the night as he accused him of trying to get into his tent, lots of swearing and made us feel very uneasy at around 11pm.
Wir sind begeistert vom schönen und gepflegten Camping. Die Lage ist Top.

We rented a cabin for 2 nights, great central location. Bit of fighting outside early hours of the morning. But all ok in the morning. Little shack for breakfast and walk and swim over at front beach.

Just stayed overnight for visiting family.
Nice and convenient to town
Clean room
The ambiance here is always inviting and comfortable
Massive camp ground. Lots of grass. Only one camp kitchen. A long way from some camp sites. Amenities quite busy. A lot to look after. They do a good job.

Had a beautiful stay at this park! It was refreshing to arrive and see that we were close to the water. Big beautiful outdoor setting looking out to the water, not too far up the footpath you can purchase delicious fish and chips and bring them back to eat on your verandah , the atmosphere is lovely. The cabin is quite spacious.

The amenities blocks are clean and tidy. The sites are good sized and well maintained. The spoon drains on some sites are very hard to reverse over. The internet is very poor throughout the park and tv reception is patchy.
Friendly staff. Great location. Good facilities. Clean. Pet friendly. A big park, but plenty of space. The pool looked awesome

Stayed at the powered site for 2 nights,  the park is in a great location but it is very packed and tight! Amenities are ok, but barely any pressure in shower and water variates temperature as your  showering!  Gutters are ridiculous, put some grates over them, I'm sure you make enough money to do that.  Along with the bins being far away, at least have some near the BBQ. And why is there only 1 camp kitchen? It's a very large holiday park and feel that it is ridiculous to expect campers to walk so far with supplies to make a meal!  Also I was near the sewage dump point and the smell was disgusting.

In future I would much prefer to stay at another holiday park that isn't so commercial.
Large place. I felt like it was over crowded. They seem to have used up as much of the park as they would. Wouldn't recommend staying there.

Die Lage ist super und drr Camping ist schön mit Bäumen ausgestattet.
1 Stern abzug gibt es, weil auf unserem Stellplatz mehrere Hundekots herumlagen. Vor unserer Ankunft wäre es angebracht gewesen, diese zu entfernen - waren hart, daher schon älter.
The cabin had all the mod cons and was very comfortable. We found Port Macquarie to be a great spot for a stay.

We stayed in a cabin on the hill, overlooking the park. The cabin had a comfy double bed, and another bedroom with a bunk bed.|Pros: the cabin had a nice view, was very clean and comfortable, the reception staff were lovely, check in was super easy, the pool was clean and big, the park was conveniently located on the foreshore.|Cons: the kitchen sink had a bit of a smell - it may need a flush out, the shower had no door so water soaked the floor mat and ran into the hall a little bit, the bunk bed was squeaky so the kids took a while to sleep.|Overall, we loved our stay here as a base to explore Port Macquarie! The kids caught a couple of fish from the rock wall, everything you need is a walkable distance, and the park staff and guests were all friendly.
Caravan sites are all good. The widest town i know... cant stand all the wind every day.
Have stayed here a few times and have always found it a lovely place to stay
Great location  easy walking

Stayed in a cabin for 3 nights, cabin was clean with a comfy bed, the bathroom was a little small but was still find for our needs.

Park has good facilities and is close enough to town to walk.

Overall a great stay.
We always stay here on the way to the south coast. Central to everything nearby
What a place . Absolutely amazing...
Busy park great spot. Will not stay here again, too many dogs! Getting woken up at 5am then 6.45 by barking dogs is not what you want on holidays

Had a perfect stay in Studio cabin 3. Fully decked out with kitchenette, small seating area, verandah with outdoor setting, soft towels and spotless in every way. Staff at booking and check in were great fun ( they were actual people ) and made my stay enjoyable. Yes I’d go back.
Spent Oct long weekend there, amazing park, what a cracker location! We will be back
A great studio apartment in a great location. Perfect for our long weekend stay
Beautiful spot!!
We come every year.
We had a powered site and had plenty of room.

First overnight stop for our recent trip north. This was, without question, the single worst pool experience imaginable — a true disaster zone masquerading as a swimming facility. The chlorine smell was so intense it felt like standing in a vat of chemicals; my eyes were stinging, my throat was raw, and I could practically taste bleach in the air. The water was cloudy and filthy, filled with floating hair, plasters, and other unidentifiable objects that made it look more like a swamp than a pool.
The pool area itself was appalling. The tiles were slimy and treacherously slippery, the air was thick and humid with a sour, moldy stench, and the walls and ceiling were stained with what looked like years of neglect. I honestly thought parts of the ceiling might collapse. The changing rooms were disgusting too — puddles of murky water across the floor, showers that reeked of rot, and an overall feeling that the entire place was breeding bacteria by the second.
Noise levels were unbearable, with machinery clanging constantly over the deafening echo of screams. The pool area was scattered with trash, soggy towels, and even insects crawling near the benches. At one point, I thought I saw something moving in the water that definitely wasn’t human.
The only redeeming quality was the kindness of the staff, who remained patient and welcoming despite clearly working in conditions that could only be described as hazardous. Their friendliness was commendable, but it did nothing to disguise the reality: this facility should be condemned, not open to the public.

A Fawlty Towers experience. Been to two NRMA parks and both sent me to an already occupied site (long time traveller never experiencing it anywhere else). This time, instead of driving back to the office for 3 repeats, I jumped into a nearby vacant site and rang the office to let them know where I was and try and stop the domino effect. This one is also laid out terribly for those travelling light. There are some BBQs scattered around and some tiny sinks (if you don't washing up with fish scales) but if you need the camp kitchen it's a ten minute round trip from the unpowered and grass sites. Next fiasco. For once I regretted asking to be close to the amenities, checkouts 10, check in 12 and the amenities for those generally without any are closed for cleaning between 1 and 4pm. As they don't warn you, had a lot of bewildered campers asking nearest person (me) what was going on. There are the caravan section amenities a five minute round trip away if you do the right thing and follow the long grid roads, but no one does and wanders straight through your site so there's no privacy. At least I met tons of people. The bins are quite a walk too. Tip's If your on the unpowered sites the public toilets near the very noisy skateboard park just next to you are closer. Just stroll along the gaudy unfenced seawall running the length of the park dodging hordes of tourists and teenagers doing wheelies on bikes.  The final insult to steerage class campers is the advertised wifi barely reaches that end of the park. Guess the wifi dishes on the amenities block you see are there for security cameras to  ensure your not nicking NRMA toiletpaper. If you're in a campervan, trailer, rooftop or tent don't go here, you leave feeling like your comfort really doesn't matter. Easily spoke to fifty inmates yesterday, only one had positive things to say about their  stay ... My positive contribution would be the showers were warm with good pressure, when you can access them. Staff are very nice, so don't blame them for management decisions. Anyway, the photo shows site in background from a local tourist attraction.

I’m a regular guest who travels solo and relies on the camp kitchen for daily essentials — not a toaster for a midnight snack, but actual cooking and nourishment. The current layout places the unpowered sites around 350 metres from the kitchen. That’s a 700-metre round trip to make dinner, carry water, or boil a kettle — sometimes multiple times a day, in the rain, with no lighting, no shelter, and no basic utility points nearby.

As a former park manager myself, I understand logistics — but this isn’t a layout issue. This is a corporate budgeting choice.

Powered guests rarely need the kitchen. Unpowered guests often rely on it. Yet we’re the ones placed furthest from it.

It’s time NRMA opened its wallet for the people who line it.

A simple satellite kitchen — even a basic shelter with a sink, tap, microwave, and bench — would fix the problem overnight. It doesn’t need bells and whistles. Just fairness.

This isn’t directed at your on-site team — they’re doing a great job. But head office needs to hear this. The message from the ground is simple: if you’re going to charge real money, offer real access to the basics.

Wir verbrachten im Oktober eine Nacht auf einem Powered Campsite im NRMA Port Macquarie Breakwall Holiday Park und waren sehr zufrieden! Der Campground ist zentral gelegen, direkt an der Küste und in der Nähe des Stadtzentrums – perfekt, um alles in Port Macquarie bequem zu erkunden.

Der Stellplatz war gut ausgestattet, sauber und ruhig. Die sanitären Einrichtungen waren ebenfalls in einem guten Zustand, sauber und gepflegt. Die gesamte Anlage machte einen sehr einladenden und organisierten Eindruck, und das Personal war freundlich und hilfsbereit.

Wir würden diesen Campingplatz auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen und kommen gerne wieder!
Was on a double slab powered site with caravan. Park amazing, and in a brilliant location to walk to beaches and bars/restaurants. Park facilities very new looking and spotlessly clean.

Fantastic caravan park that was well equiped and had activities on for kids, they organised a movie night and had a pizza truck and prawn selling van on site on various days.
Easily able to walk to the break wall, beaches and good coffee shops. The park had a good vibe about it. The cabin was clean, although a bit of a strange set up with bunk beds central in the room and two bucket chairs rather than a lounge, although perhaps the space didn’t allow for a lounge.

The only issue was the staff weren’t that helpful when I really needed it when trying to move my car out by checkout time, as a Mum travelling solo with two young kids, when I asked for flexibility to help me navigate the youngest asleep in the pram, they weren’t interested in being helpful which slightly spoilt a lovely stay. Otherwise every other interaction with staff had been positive.
Fantastic site in the centre of Port Macquarie. I’ll be back!
Great spot to holiday. Close to beach and town. Needs more lighting where the flood gullys are in the road as these are a major fall hazard.
Amazing location right next to the beach and skate park.
Super friendly and helpful staff even in busy school holidays. Great location Amenities great, clean and very usable.

Although parks is on a very good location at Port Macquarie .The manager/in charge person is unprofessional and ignorant. First night in the park kids were playing in a designated kids area 8:30pm and she starting to yell at them, telling them to go to bed (silence rules were 8am-10pm). Next day, first day of daylights, she closed down the pool 5:50pm, yelling again saying the pool was closed. Pool rules 8am-dusk.
Not understanding how a person like that manages a NRMA caravan park. REALLY DISAPPOINTED.
Good location. Facilities too small (queues for toilets). Rubbish bins very far away with not many around. POOR customer service. They making their own rules everyday. 6pm closing the pool.

We are currently staying here on a powered slab site and highly recommend.
Super clean amenities and a well maintained park.
Staff are extremely friendly and a credit to the Park.
Walking distance to everywhere.
We wish we booked longer.!
We will be back.
Really well organized place
Caravan park is spacious,  the amenities are spotless.  We walked everywhere as most places are within 20 mins walk. A very short walk to do a spot of fishing,  staff are great. Highly recommended 👌

Great location, great accomodation, horrible manager!!!

The cabin that we stayed in was lovely, apart from having to make my own beds, i can’t fault the accomodation.

Our parents were staying in their caravan so they popped up to visit us with their dog. Having read the T/C’s, it clearly states no pets INSIDE THE CABINS! So we kept the dog outside on the balcony. Then we had a random person came to the door, stating the dog is not allowed on the verandah because it gives the perception that they are inside the cabin. The issue we had was not with the dog on the verandah!

The ‘so called’ manager, needs help! My husband told my daughter to come inside and not talk to strangers which offended this person. She then made my husband go outside only to give him an earful of her horrible day and an attempt to give him a lesson on being kind! In no way was he not kind towards her! She clearly took offence to being called a stranger! The reality is, she was! She did not introduce herself, she was in no uniform nor a name badge and we have never met het! So he had every right to give our daughter instructions and tell her not to talk to this person. When I asked her to end the conversation, she continued to carry on. She told us how her day was so bad and that she’s been dealing with her own husband crying in the car and not coping! It honestly felt like she had unleashed a whole day of misery out on us. She was in no state to be at work due to allowing her personal issues interfere with how she handles herself in a professional manner. We were so embarrassed to sit on the balcony because you could hear her talking about us to other guest and a coworker as well as pointing at us on the balcony.

I emailed them twice and also called with no response! This business clearly don’t take feedback seriously or care about their employees as I made it clear that this individual needs help and should be offered time off or employee assistance!

Me giving any stars is being kind!!!

This park is in an awesome location, walking tracks at your doorstep, restaurants/cafes close, beach not too far. Pool area looked great but pool was a little chilly for us.
They have vans come in selling pizza, hot potatoes and fresh prawns.
But it’s a huge park and you have to be lucky to get a good site. Our site was tricky to get into but once settled we were happy. Port Macquarie is very pretty and definitely worth visiting.

Such small sites.  Very disappointing. We were on site 131 right on the corner and other vans arrived and boxed us in. Couldn’t even see people as our car was right in front of us. Our draw bar was over the gully’s they have around the park.   A few big sites on one side of the grass area but definitely not enough around the park.  Families have big vans these days….. and most draw bars were getting onto the road.
Another couple came behind us…. Had a 9metre van, as was ours, they struggled to fit it on the tiny concrete slab, the wife went up to complain and one of the receptionists  told her she didn’t measure here van properly.  She was told to book it as a 10metre van next time.  Just shocking.  They need to close it down and upgrade the whole park to accommodate for families with big vans.

Great pool, great location,  clean amenities.  Not worth the $ to be crammed in such small spots.  Not relaxing at all.

Won’t be back.
Amazing receptionist. She told us the room price and said that if it was too expensive there was a cheaper place down the road. I would suggest booking though. 😀

We stayed here for 2 night with 4 kids. If you have a big van you need to book early as they are limited on big van spots but other then that this caravan park is perfect for families.
The amenities were clean and the park well maintained with awesome friendly staff upon arrival. There is a huge skate park and playground right next door with an amazing Cafe.
Highly recommend 👌
Great park, clean, good sites and great location. Will definitely come again!
Very good
Camped in rooftop tent nice cheap and clean
A wonderfully beautiful caravan park. Great location close to town. Very clean amenities.

Be careful with the misunderstanding message on their website.

Bad experience for booking. When I made the booking it said that FREE CANCELLATION! Everyone can check online. It’s still there!

But when I call to cancel, they said there is $30 fee for cancellation!!!

A very popular park in an excellent location close to the CBD, fishing and beaches. A favourite of ours. NRMA has been slowly renovating the park since taking over a few years ago. Very happy to see the new amenities and the ground work being done around the park. A huge improvement. Great staff, very helpful and friendly. Highly recommended.
Good caravan park but the people in the reception should allocate the sites around the. Pools and play areas to families with children.

Right on the waterfront which is nice. Plenty of amenities. The small camp kitchen is quite a walk away from the unpowered sites so we needed to trek up to charge our devices a bit. Huge site with a very friendly atmosphere. Amenities very modern and clean.

We had previously stayed at the park a number of times and what bought us back remains.  A great park with immaculate and clean facilities, close proximity to town and Town Beach.
I mentioned when I was booking we would be celebrating a milestone wedding anniversary.  We would like to thank the staff and especially a very thoughtful member of staff the Park concierge Anneka who visited our site to present us with a lovely anniversary card from NRMA, small box of chocolates, two coffee vouchers and a bottle of wine to help us celebrate.
A big tick of appreciation from my wife and myself.  50 years of marriage is a big milestone.
Thank you Anneka, staff and NRMA for your great customer service and kind thoughtfulness.
Lovely holiday for myself and disabled wife
Great location for a caravan park. Super friendly staff. Very busy park but was quiet in the evenings.

The most immaculate park we have stayed in. The cabins have everything you need including a beautiful view over the breakwater. Within walking distance to main shopping precinct.
Chill out with a glass of wine whilst you take in the amazing sunsets. Or take a lazy walk along the breakwater to stretch your tired legs. Thankyou to all the staff for your hospitality.
Jan
Sehr groß und dadurch etwas unübersichtlich. Sehr schöne Lage. Mit etwas Glück kann man von der Staumauer Delphine beobachten.Sanitäre Anlagen sehr ordentlich.
Very chill
Très bon camping, bien placé...
Just an amazing place. Location is amazing, close to the breakwall, which is amazing to walk on!

This is a huge park. The Powered caravan sites are very very close & very tight & roads in are very narrow.  We are 27 ft to draw & hitch was only just off the road. We felt too enclosed & too close to neighbours for comfort. However the park is well maintained & amenities clean. It is situated right on water, short walk to shops & restaurants & port central for everything. Great path for coastal walk. Enjoyed beautiful prawns from the Prawn van & good pizza from pizza van. Weekends were noisy late into the evenings. 4 stars for location & cleanliness.

Really tidy looking park with updated facilities. Park can’t help the rain but wow it absolutely destroyed the caravan sites. They became muddy pits even with the good road drainage and kept grass.  The drive through town was fine just felt uncomfortably narrow for a 22ft caravan. Lovely activity options including the koala conservation/hospital and the rainforest walk.
A lovely holiday park located in Port Macquarie NSW, clean and well maintained cabins with all the facilities you need for a relaxing stay.
Great location well kept park will definitely be back

Top location, awesome level sites some with double slabs, very well maintained lawns and gardens, modern clean amenities and super friendly and helpful staff, all combined to make our stay the best we've had in Port Macquarie.

We've been here before & always had friendly,helpful & polite staff in the office.The Park is huge & kept beautiful.The caravan site we had was a good size slab.The amenities are lovely, & clean.There's a great variety of Cabins for any amount of guests.There's a playground & other games to keep children busy.Lovely walk along the Breakwall to Main Bch or into town by the River & you can see Dolphins.
One of the most popular tourist destinations in Port Macquarie. It's really recommended and you should not miss this Break Water Walk. Some good day, you will spot dolphins, like we do. ☺️

I stayed one night in a studio cabin and had a good experience overall. The cabin had all the essential amenities: a fridge, microwave, smart TV, etc. The walls lacked insulation, so we had to keep the noise low to avoid disturbing other guest. Fortunately, the other guest did the same, so we had a good night's sleep.
Best location in Port Macquarie for caravans, camping and cabins. If you want town centre, next to the beach, fishing this is the place, fees are high but perfect position 👌
Perfect location. Waking up right next to the breakwall for a morning walk with my puppy is exactly what I needed.

Location was brilliant, beautiful views, quiet, clean, comfortable and spaceous, new appliances, modern beach vibe a totally fun experience. Onsite parking and the staff were so lovely. Restaurants close by serving a variety of delicious options. I wouldn't stay anywhere else. Thank you!
Great location, was lovely to have a morning stroll along the water. Studio was clean. The bed was 2 singles pushed together though which made the night sleep a bit uncomfortable.
Great place always stay here
Great service, no wait,thankyou NRMA

Great area, close to everything including shops boardwalk, beaches.
Clean and friendly park
Fantastic

We shall return

We extended our stay for 2 extra nights on top of our normal stay on a caravan site.The staff at reception are fantastic. Great facilities, great location, very clean park. The only dissapointment was some of there ground staff were like they had eaten several lemons. It was like it was an effort for them to even say hi,and so abrupt..Anyway would stay here again.
Amazing spot nice sites clean amenities close to all shops etc
Great location!
Really noisy because of the location of the skate park and basketball court. Also, barking and yapping of other inconsiderate park residents dogs. Not a peaceful, relaxing stay at all.

Back yet again to the breakwall now for past 5 years..! This place has everything you need and all within walking distance and I dont mean a marathon walk. The views are amazing, watching the sea life and dolphins within metres of your cabin. The location of the park so ideal to the surf beach, skate park and coffee on one side and the 'little shack' set up on the other, caters for all needs, food, drinks and entertainment. The staff here have always been brilliant, friendly and attentative and always try to accomodate. We absolutely love coming back here to this caravan park for all it and Port Mac has to offer.
Good powered site's clean facilities and beautiful town

Great location to sit back and relax
Enjoyed our 3rd stay here. Was a shame it poured most of the time, but not the parks fault!!
Beautiful place to stay.
Very busy during peak times.
This is one of the nicest parks we've stayed at. Beautiful location and immaculate grounds with amenities cleaned thoroughly every day.

Stayed at an unpowered site for 3 nights. Fabulous location and great park. Only negative was that the amenities although new were not cleaned often or well  enough. Shower cubicles had hair and dirt. Toilet paper on floor.
Amazing camp site with clean amenities and heated pool

Just home from a great week in this park, 5 nights camping and last night in a fabulous cabin. The faculties are excellent, modern  & clean toilets and a lovely, safe & friendly atmosphere. We can’t wait to come back. Highly recommend for families.
Wonderful location. Clean, very friendly and with lots of great features and facilities.

Absolutely love coming to Nrma Breakwall

Great place to unwind.  Staff very friendly.  Free sausage sizzle once a week.  Local fisherman drives in on Thursday and has fresh fish and prawns.
Only prob is dogs are not allowed in cabins.  Maybe later??

I just came here for staying a night , but the facility of BBQ just two left around C area, when dinner time was coming, many people wait for it and the sink for washing just one for people who need, and the refrigerator is far from C area, I was inconvenient, the prices also higher than another, if gave me a chance, I wouldn’t choose the caravans park 🙁
None powered site. Amenities were close and all who stayed were very friendly. Not a rowdy  bugger in sight awsome

Poor service, felt like we were being held to account for others stupidity. Definitely won’t be back.
Great spot for an overnight RV stop. Clean and tidy with all facilities.  Easy access to beach.
Large park great location with excellent staff. Pets welcome as well, site's are good sizes
Lovely area, close to shops. Staff very friendly and helpful. Everything here absolutely love it.

Absolutely satisfied thanks to Jo in reception after our very confusing decision making Jo made it so easy to organise and she was very patient with us during the process! High regards for this holiday park is it is the perfect place to camp. It is our first time as a couple having a holiday and to do it camping was made so easy with this holiday park. This is a great Park situated by the well known Breakwall.  Its central to some awesome walks  south or north of tha Park. A Shot stroll into town and shops and eateries. Just to the left of the Park entrance is the beach side 'Little Shack' great for Breakfast or Brunch, lunch , sun downers or dinner. Just about 150 meters further on are tour bookings, like the Sea Plane flights, Fishing Charters, Day and sunset cruises, amongst others. We spent two weeks here and it was a delight to do so.
The Park amenities are abundant and kept clean. The pool is larger than you would expect and it's kept sparkling .

We have been on the road for a year and a half and we rare the location of this park as one of the best.

We did camping here. The camping sites were all full since it was a long weekend. The location was great and overall toilets and bathrooms were in good condition with 24/7 water availability. Kitchen had induction stove, if someone wanted to cook something serious. And usual barbecue stations were available, as you would find in any other place in Australia. The only problem we felt was that the camp sites were too close to each other.

We took our kids to the pool & it started to rain whilst there. As there was no cover at all, I had to step just outside the gate to be under a roof where I watched our kids. Probably 5 steps away. Our kids can swim! I was told I needed to go back into the rain, next to pool! There was absolutely no consideration for the fact that it was raining. She cared less whether I had to stand in the rain! I find this pretty poor. The park is very boring, nothing for kids to do except the pool & you better hope it’s not raining! Don’t bother coming!! Disappointing.

Perfect location with everything you would need and if there is anything you forgot, the shops are not very far away. Please make sure if you want an ice-cream from the front office you will need cash
Great setting, clean and close to restaurants and beach. But not so good for campers as only one camp kitchen set close to the cabins, pool etc. Too far from camp sites to be useful.
